Custom Python path (e.g. /usr/bin/python: Custom Python path (e.g. /usr/bin/python3 or python). Leave empty for default automatic resolution.
This adapter requires Python 3.8 or high: This adapter requires Python 3.8 or higher with the pyserial library installed to query the BMS. Follow the instructions below for your system type.
Connect to your system via SSH and run t:
Connect to your system via SSH and run the following command to install Python 3 and its virtual environment libraries:

sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y python3 python3-venv python3-serial
If running inside a Docker container (e.g. on Synology, Portainer, or via docker-compose), edit the container settings and add 'python3 python3-pip python3-serial' to the PACKAGES environment variable. The container will automatically install it on startup.
If your Windows machine is connected to:
If your Windows machine is connected to the internet, the adapter will automatically download and set up a portable Python 3.11 environment with pyserial on startup. If offline or if auto-download fails:

- Download Python (3.8+) from https://www.python.org/downloads/
- Run the installer and CRITICALLY check the box 'Add Python to PATH'
- Open command prompt and run: pip install pyserial
- Or enter the absolute path to python.exe in the 'Python Path / Command' setting.
